violations.text: Milk cooler and hot hold unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The presence of (small rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings in back storage area on floors and food storage bins). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.Establishment to wash and sanitize food storage bins. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (back storage room), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
Hot hold and milk cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

(Liquid cheese and sliced turkey ) was observed thawing in water(prep sink). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Observed an airbreak. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was (0 ) parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for (lactic acid ) sanitizer is (272-700) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

Employees' medicine was observed stored in the refrigerator located in the kitchen. Employees' medicines shall be stored in a designated area away from food storage. PIC moved the medicine. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024
Prep sink was observed to be leaking from pipe. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024
